title: the power of the wand
description: adds a new type of weapon to minecraft: the wand!
body:
this mod adds a new weapon to minecraft: the wand!

depending on the spell you use, you will lose a different amount of xp. if you are in creative or you have the "infinite spells" gamerule set to true, you can use the spells at any time, no matter the xp.

the wand has five different spells which can be cycled using the z key by default, but can be edited.

the first spell: wingardium leviosa. 1 level loss. sends the entity you hit(not sure if it works on players) to five blocks in the direction you look.

the second spell: blow away. 2 levels loss. launches the entity(does NOT work on players) away from where you hit. you have to hit close to your target, about 2 blocks max.

the third spell: lightning. 10 levels loss. works wherever the spell lands. destruction.

the fourth spell: ring of fire. 3 levels loss. summons a ring of tnt around you that launches one block into the air then explodes.

the fifth spell: earthquake. 10 levels loss. works wherever. tear the land to shreds and if you have a crappy computer it could crash.
